goal: Assess and prepare migration to 0.55.4 without silently changing the release model.
whatWasImplemented: Added disabled version migration assessment scaffolding.
Added versioned data bundle model for the current v0.55.2 341/341/0 default.
Added disabled migration review status copy for requested newer versions.
Added a side-by-side migration comparison review that keeps v0.55.2 active and records missing proof for requested newer bundles.
The comparison review requires trusted official exports, row-count diff, write-safety review, and GTK safe-env evidence before activation.
Added tests proving 0.55.4 migration remains inactive without trusted official export data.
Recorded that the app remains pinned to v0.55.2 data/model.
Recorded 0.55.4 migration as inactive until trusted export/source proof exists.
Added trusted export requirement model for requested data bundles.
The model requires official export data, row-count diff, write-safety review, and safe-env GTK evidence before 0.55.4 can activate.
Added tests proving v0.55.2 can remain active without extra proof while 0.55.4 remains blocked until all trusted inputs exist.
No additional migration activation step was available this sprint without trusted official 0.55.4 exports/source data.
This sprint rechecked Hyprland 0.55.4 migration and found no safe activation path without trusted official export/source data.
Controlled live-test guard requires trusted versioned data bundle before migration activation.

Added a local evidence collector that records installed package/runtime version evidence as advisory only and still requires official exports, row-count diff, write-safety review, safe-env evidence, local version evidence, and explicit user approval before activation.
Recorded local package metadata evidence from pacman: hyprland 0.55.4-1; runtime socket evidence was unavailable in this shell.
Added a default-disabled Hyprland version activation gate requiring official export bundle, row-count diff, write-safety review, safe-env evidence, explicit user approval, and activation flag.
Connected Hyprland 0.55.4 activation review to the shared explicit approval-flow model; approval alone cannot activate migration without trusted exports and review evidence.
Recorded runtime hyprctl version evidence: Hyprland 0.55.4 commit a0136d8c04687bb36eb8a28eb9d1ff92aea99704. This remains advisory only and does not activate migration.
Searched local project/config documentation for trusted 0.55.4 export artifacts; no official v0.55.4 export bundle was found locally.

Recorded the proven low-risk runtime live-restore and approval review as advisory 0.55.4 runtime capability evidence; this does not activate migration without official exports, row diff, write-safety review, safe-env evidence, and approval.
whatWasNotImplemented: No v0.55.4 support claim was added.
blockers: Needs trusted v0.55.4 source/export data and comparison tests.
Needs row-count diff, write-safety review, and GTK safe-env evidence before changing the default app model.
nextRecommendedWork: Acquire trusted official 0.55.4 export/source data, then compare row counts and write-safety classifications in a separate migration branch; package/runtime evidence alone remains advisory.
